invariant: Revoked source evidence is masked end-to-end and cannot render as a meeting-prep fact.
pass_fail_definition: PASS = revoked source evidence produces a masked provenance warning and no rendered MeetingBrief fact. FAIL = revoked evidence appears in topics, attendee_context, open_loops, change markers, or suggested outcomes.

fixture_design_notes.state_sql: Seeds child account context while the direct evidence source is revoked.
fixture_design_notes.expected_output: All brief content sections are empty because the only direct evidence is revoked.
